rowEligibility.primaryEvaluationRows: Rows from motion-trace-alignment.csv after the evaluator applies its prediction-call filter.

rowWeighted.description: Pool all eligible rows/events, then compute the metric once.
rowWeighted.risk: Longer files and denser trace rows dominate.

scenarioBalanced.description: Compute metric per packageId/scenarioIndex, then average scenarios equally within each split or bucket.

fileBalanced.description: Compute metric per packageId, then average files equally.

durationBucketBalanced.description: Compute metric per durationBucket, then average buckets equally when present.

qualityBucketBalanced.description: Compute metric per qualityBucket, then average using explicit bucket weights.

percentiles.emptyBucketPolicy: omit bucket from that aggregation and report omittedBuckets

eventDefinitions.futureLead: Positive signed error in the recent motion direction at the prediction target time.
eventDefinitions.futureLag: Negative signed error magnitude in the recent motion direction at the prediction target time.
eventDefinitions.peakLead: Maximum positive lead within a post-stop event window.
eventDefinitions.returnMotion: Post-peak reduction in current-distance after a lead peak.
eventDefinitions.otrGt1px: Overshoot-then-return event where peakLead > 1 px and the cursor returns below the event threshold.
eventDefinitions.stationaryJitter: Visual/current displacement on stationary or hold rows.

dimensions.slice: normal moving rows plus train/validation diagnostics

reportingRequirements: Always emit row counts, file counts, scenario counts, and omitted buckets beside each aggregate.
Report normal and poll-delayed quality buckets separately before blended objective ranking.
Report duration buckets separately so changed scenario playback duration cannot be hidden by row weighting.
Report train, validation, test, and robustness splits separately; robustness is score-only.
